role: Computational physics validation — QCD, nuclear structure, plasma, GPU compute

barracuda.usage: GPU f64 WGSL dispatch, DF64, tensor workloads

toadstool.usage: Workload dispatch, GPU scheduling, batch jobs

coralreef.usage: Shader compilation, GPU ISA (SASS/GFX), f64 lowering

nestgate.usage: LIME/ILDG lattice config I/O, data access

compute_triangle.pattern: GPU compute triangle: barraCuda dispatches f64 WGSL, toadStool schedules, coralReef compiles to native ISA
compute_triangle.unique_stress: f64 precision on FP32 cores (DF64), multi-GPU multi-vendor (NVIDIA/AMD/Intel)

science_provenance.pattern: DAG memoization + ledger sealing + braid provenance for peer-review reproducibility
science_provenance.unique_stress: Physics convergence criteria in braid metadata, not just hashes

sovereign_gpu.pattern: Pure Rust GPU pipeline: VFIO → SovereignInit → SASS/GFX compilation → dispatch
